case_title: OAK BROOK BANK vs. MCCARTHY, STEPHANIE M. AN INDIVIDUAL et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-03-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-03-1997 CONTINUED FROM DEC-03-1996 TO JAN-07-1997 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-18-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-18-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DIRECTED TO PLFF. HEARING SET FOR NOV-15-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-15-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 11/15/96: IF NO PROOF OF SERVICE SIGNED ORDER TO PUBLISH MUST BE FILED. (CONT'D AS AN OSC - FEES FOR DEC. TO CONTINUE NOT RECEIVED TIMELY) PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF SERVED. HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO ALLOW SERVICE OF PROCESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OAK BROOK BANK

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OAK BROOK BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MCCARTHY, STEPHANIE M. AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 100 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-18-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-19-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-30-1996
